title: All Rate Plans
description: Manage your property's pricing strategies and availability rules.
modal_description: Define the details for your rate plan. Click save when you're done.
no_room_types_warning: You must define at least one Room Type before creating a Rate Plan.

list.no_plans_message: No rate plans found. Click "Create New Rate Plan" to get started.

form.open_ended_label: This is an open-ended block (no end date)
form.description_placeholder: Brief description of this rate plan.
form.pricing_per_guest_description: Enter the price per night for the specified number of guests. At least one price is required.
form.no_occupancy_note: The selected room type has a max occupancy of 0 guests.
form.base_price_description: This flat rate applies per night regardless of the number of guests (up to the room's max occupancy).
form.cancellation_policy_placeholder: Describe the cancellation terms for this rate plan.
form.default_plan_label: Set as default rate plan for the selected room type

delete_dialog.title: Are you absolutely sure?
delete_dialog.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the rate plan "{{planName}}".

toasts.validation_error_description: Plan Name, Room Type association, and at least one valid Price are required.

access_denied.title: Access Denied
access_denied.description: You do not have permission to manage rate plans. Please contact an administrator.
